penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. The loop was not successfully secured on the middle appendage and the tail was not cut inside the trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task at maximum time (180s) with no tail cutting observed, while GPT reported successful completion at 120s with tail cutting. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, Claude's assessment takes precedence as incomplete task penalties are binary and critical to scoring validity.
